description: Implement 5-level test pyramid with unified hex test entry point: lint (clippy+tsc), unit tests for hex-cli modules, Vitest for dashboard stores, integration test cleanup, SpacetimeDB module tests, and agent-browser E2E testing.
adr: ADR-057 (unified test harness), ADR-005 (quality gates), ADR-014 (no mock.module)

phases.name: hex test lint subcommand
phases.description: Add a Lint variant to TestAction that runs cargo clippy (workspace + spacetime-modules) and bun run check. This is the lowest-friction improvement — pure additive, no new deps.

tasks.name: Add Lint variant to TestAction enum
tasks.description: Add `Lint` to the TestAction enum in hex-cli/src/commands/test.rs. Wire it into the run() match arm to call a new run_lint_checks() function.

tasks.name: Implement run_lint_checks()
tasks.description: Add run_lint_checks(r: &mut TestResults) that runs: (1) cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings, (2) cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings in spacetime-modules/, (3) bun run check (if bun is available). Each is a separate check() call. Use Command::new like the existing helpers.

tasks.name: Wire lint into hex test all
tasks.description: Add run_lint_checks() call to the TestAction::All branch, between unit and arch. Update the Full variant (add if missing) to run all + e2e.

phases.name: hex-cli unit tests
phases.description: Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests blocks to hex-cli modules that have testable pure logic. No new files — tests live inline.

tasks.name: Unit tests for readme.rs
tasks.description: Add tests to hex-cli/src/commands/readme.rs: (1) parse_adr_summaries handles various ADR formats (missing status, different title patterns). (2) sync_adr_section replaces content between sentinels without touching surrounding text. (3) sync_adr_section appends section when sentinels are missing. (4) generate_readme produces expected structure for each language. Use tempdir for file-based tests.

tasks.name: Unit tests for interview.rs
tasks.description: Add tests for is_empty_project(): (1) truly empty dir returns true. (2) dir with only .git/ returns true. (3) dir with .git/ + .hex/ returns true. (4) dir with any other file returns false. (5) dir with a subdirectory returns false. Use tempdir.

tasks.name: Unit tests for adr.rs
tasks.description: Add tests for parse_adr_status(): (1) accepted status from **Status:** line. (2) proposed status. (3) unknown when no status line. (4) case-insensitive matching. Also test extract_title() and parse_enforced_by() with various input formats.

phases.name: Integration test cleanup
phases.description: Fix integration tests so they clean up swarms, tasks, and memory entries after running. Prevents state pollution across test runs.

tasks.name: Add teardown to run_integration_tests()
tasks.description: At the end of run_integration_tests() in test.rs, complete the test swarm via PATCH /api/swarms/:id and delete the test memory key. Use best-effort (ignore errors) so cleanup doesn't mask real test failures. Also deregister the test agent via DELETE /api/agents/:id.

phases.name: Dashboard Vitest setup + store tests
phases.description: Add Vitest to the dashboard (hex-nexus/assets/) and write unit tests for the most critical stores. Integrate into hex test unit.

tasks.name: Initialize Vitest in hex-nexus/assets
tasks.description: Add vitest as a devDependency in hex-nexus/assets/package.json. Create vitest.config.ts with solid-js plugin. Add a test script. Create src/stores/__tests__/ directory.

tasks.name: Test toast store
tasks.description: Create hex-nexus/assets/src/stores/__tests__/toast.test.ts. Test: addToast() creates toast with correct type/message, toast auto-expires after timeout, dismissToast() removes by id, max toast limit is enforced.

tasks.name: Test hexflo-monitor store
tasks.description: Create hex-nexus/assets/src/stores/__tests__/hexflo-monitor.test.ts. Test: completed swarms don't re-toast on initialization, failed tasks trigger error toast, completedSwarms set is seeded from swarm status. Mock the connection store signals.

tasks.name: Wire dashboard tests into hex test unit
tasks.description: Add run_dashboard_tests(r: &mut TestResults) to test.rs. Runs npx vitest run in hex-nexus/assets/. Called from run_unit_tests(). Skips gracefully if vitest not installed.

phases.name: SpacetimeDB module tests (P0 priority)
phases.description: Add cargo tests to the two highest-risk untested WASM modules: agent-registry and workplan-state.

gate.command: cd spacetime-modules && cargo test -p agent-registry -p workplan-state

tasks.name: Tests for agent-registry module
tasks.description: Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests to spacetime-modules/agent-registry/src/lib.rs. Test: register_agent creates valid entry, heartbeat updates timestamp, status transitions (active → stale → dead), remove_agent deletes from table. Use SpacetimeDB's test utilities for in-memory table access.

tasks.name: Tests for workplan-state module
tasks.description: Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests to spacetime-modules/workplan-state/src/lib.rs. Test: create workplan with phases, task status transitions (pending → in_progress → completed), invalid transitions are rejected, phase completion triggers next phase.

phases.name: E2E testing with agent-browser
phases.description: Set up agent-browser based E2E tests that validate the dashboard renders correctly and responds to interaction. Uses AI-optimized accessibility snapshots.

tasks.name: Add E2e variant to TestAction
tasks.description: Add E2e and Full variants to TestAction enum. E2e runs run_e2e_tests(). Full runs all + e2e. Wire into match arm.

tasks.name: Implement run_e2e_tests() with agent-browser
tasks.description: Add run_e2e_tests(r: &mut TestResults) that: (1) checks agent-browser is installed, (2) verifies nexus is running at :5555, (3) runs agent-browser open http://127.0.0.1:5555, (4) takes snapshot -i and verifies key elements exist (sidebar, project list, status bar), (5) navigates to /chat and verifies chat input exists, (6) takes screenshot to tests/e2e/dashboard.png, (7) closes browser. Each step is a check() call.

tasks.name: Create E2E test script for CI
tasks.description: Create scripts/e2e-test.sh that starts nexus, waits for health check, runs hex test e2e, captures exit code, stops nexus, exits with captured code. This wraps the full lifecycle for CI.

phases.name: CI pipeline
phases.description: Create GitHub Actions workflow that runs the full test matrix: lint, unit, integration, and optional E2E.

tasks.name: Create .github/workflows/test.yml
tasks.description: Create the CI workflow with 4 jobs: lint (clippy + tsc), unit (cargo test + bun test + vitest), integration (needs lint+unit, requires SpacetimeDB service container, runs hex test services + arch), e2e (needs integration, runs scripts/e2e-test.sh). Cache cargo targets and node_modules. Use ubuntu-latest.
